layoutRegions.name: access-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for protected resources, healthy grants, review gates, and deny actions.

layoutRegions.name: access-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: Protected resource inventory with owner, device posture gate, identity risk, and access state.

layoutRegions.name: risk-and-policy-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Identity risk, stale access exceptions, owner intent, exception windows, and rollback-safe zero-trust policy changes.

components.name: ResourceAccessCard
components.purpose: Focusable protected resource card with owner, gate requirements, identity risk, and access state.
interactions: state badge distinguishes allowed, review, and deny access
gate requirements wrap without horizontal overflow

components.name: RiskFinding
components.purpose: Identity risk finding with resource subject, evidence, and access state.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review

components.name: ZeroTrustPolicyChange
components.purpose: Zero-trust policy change with exception window, rollback guard, and access probe.
interactions: rollback guidance wraps without horizontal overflow

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
